# Glucose formation process

## Short Teaching Summary
Glucose formation process: Glucose, the primary energy source in cells, is made from two three-carbon GA3Ps. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
